privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: At {{appName}} we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it and how we protect it.

s1.title: 1. Information we collect
s1.body:
We collect the following information when you use {{appName}}:

• Email address (to create your account)
• The username you choose
• Answers to questions (to compute your stats)
• Day streak, scores and personal records

We do not collect location data, contacts or other sensitive information.

s2.title: 2. How we use your information
s2.body:
We use your data only to:

• Show your profile and stats within the app
• Compute daily, weekly and global rankings
• Keep your streak of consecutive answers
• Send you local notifications if you enable them (only on your device)
• Keep the app free by showing limited ads through Google AdMob

We do not sell or rent your personal data.

s3.title: 3. Data storage
s3.body:
Your data is stored securely on Supabase (PostgreSQL), with encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS). Passwords are never stored in plain text.

Questions and answers may be cached locally on your device to enable offline use.

s4.title: 4. Advertising
s4.body:
{{appName}} may show interstitial ads through Google AdMob after natural moments of play, such as the daily question, a time-attack round or blocks of learning questions.

On iOS we will ask for permission through App Tracking Transparency. If you decline, ads will be shown in a non-personalized way without tracking. If you accept, AdMob may use your advertising identifier to show more relevant ads.

s5.title: 5. Push notifications
s5.body: If you enable notifications, {{appName}} will send a daily reminder at 9:00 so you don't lose your streak. Notifications are completely local and you can disable them at any time from your profile or your system settings.

s6.title: 6. Your rights
s6.body:
You have the right to:

• Access your data at any time (from the profile screen)
• Change your username
• Delete your account (contact us at the email below)
• Export your data on request
• Withdraw advertising-tracking consent from your system settings

s7.title: 7. Minors
s7.body: {{appName}} is intended for people over 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13. If you believe your child has created an account, contact us to delete it.

s8.title: 8. Contact
s8.body:
For any questions about this privacy policy or to request the deletion of your data, contact us at:

pablobrasero@gmail.com

s9.title: 9. Changes to this policy
s9.body: We may update this policy occasionally. We will notify you of significant changes through the app. Continued use of the app implies acceptance of the updated policy.
